text: The transition from a quiet, sterile hallway to the vibrant and thoughtful display of research and development intrigues me. The glass is both barrier and invitation. Inside, surrounded by the colorful, considered details of R&D, I feel a pressing awareness of human curiosity and ingenuity. I am a witness to innovation—a place where ideas are born and evolve. I feel excited, and a little awed, by the sense that human progress is both collective and deeply personal.
